deepDive.title: UltraQuant: 4-bit KV Caching for Context-Heavy Agents
deepDive.summary: This paper is a multi agent systems lead from the research stream. Context-heavy agents place unusual pressure on the key-value (KV) cache: long prefixes are reused across many short turns, while concurrency determines whether the serving system can keep GPUs utilized. It gets the longer read because the public context is source-grounded and the item is close to the systems layer.
